meta.summary.defaultMessage: A browser extension to control your Pi-hole conveniently from within the browser.

meta.description.disclaimer.defaultMessage: The extension is not associated with or endorsed by Pi-hole.

meta.feature.blocking.description.defaultMessage: Toggle Pi-hole blocking on or off from the popup, or temporarily disable it for a preset duration (10s, 30s, 5m, 30m, 1h) with a live countdown that re-enables it automatically.

meta.feature.domain.description.defaultMessage: See whether the current tab's domain is blocked or allowlisted and toggle it instantly, without opening the Pi-hole admin interface.

meta.feature.stats.description.defaultMessage: View today's query count, blocked count, block percentage, and cache hits, each with a 24-hour sparkline. Optional donut charts break down queries by status and type.

meta.feature.systemInfo.description.defaultMessage: See uptime, CPU load, memory usage, and temperature at a glance in the popup.

meta.feature.groups.description.defaultMessage: Enable or disable blocking groups and individual blocklists directly from the popup.

meta.feature.multiInstance.description.defaultMessage: Connect to multiple Pi-holes and switch between them with per-instance tabs in the popup.

meta.feature.badge.description.defaultMessage: Shows blocked percentage, ON/OFF state, or active client count.

meta.feature.customization.description.defaultMessage: Adjust the popup layout, badge behavior, language, and more from the extension options.
